headline: Adobe (ADBE) Buys Topaz Labs As AI Revenue Runs At 3x Prior Year
summary: Adobe (NasdaqGS:ADBE) has agreed to acquire Topaz Labs, a specialist in AI-powered creative tools. The company reports AI-first net new annualized recurring revenue running at roughly 3x the level of the prior year. These moves point to a tighter integration of generative AI across Adobe's core creative and digital media offerings. Adobe enters this phase of AI expansion with its stock at $230.61, after a mixed performance in recent years. The shares are up 5.8% over the past week and 13.0%...

headline: Adobe (ADBE) Freemium AI Push Puts Valuation Back In Focus
summary: Adobe (ADBE) is in focus after management outlined a shift toward a freemium approach for its AI powered products, tying success to AI first annual recurring revenue, which is now above US$500 million. See our latest analysis for Adobe. The freemium AI push comes at a time when Adobe’s share price has bounced, with a 1 day share price return of 3.12% and 30 day share price return of 13.03%. However, this sits against a weaker backdrop, with the year to date share price return down 30.81% and...
